Revised Unity Eye Serum VSL Outline (27-Minute Long-Form)

1) Pre-Lead/MicroLead (1:00)

Hook: "If you're a woman over 35 who's been shocked by the sudden appearance of crow's feet, under-eye wrinkles, or dark circles that make you look exhausted even when you're well-rested..."

Pain Point Connection: "...and you've tried expensive eye creams, department store 'miracles,' even professional treatments, but nothing seems to work..."

Solution Promise: "...then what I'm about to reveal will be the most important breakthrough you'll ever discover for transforming your eye area and getting back the youthful, confident look you deserve."

2) Lead - Opening Multiple Loops (4:00)

a) Call Out Problem: The devastating moment when you look in the mirror and don't recognize the tired, aged face staring back

b) Promise Solution + Transformation: Paint the picture - imagine waking up with bright, rested eyes that match how you feel inside, being confident enough to go makeup-free, receiving compliments about looking refreshed and youthful

c) Tease Emotional Discovery Story: "I'm going to share the heartbreaking story of how a busy Florida mom discovered the real reason why every eye cream had failed her..."

d) Tease Unique Mechanism: "You'll discover the shocking scientific truth about what's really happening at the cellular level that causes your eyes to age faster than the rest of your face..."

e) Contrarian Teaser: "And why everything you've been told about collagen loss is missing the most critical piece of the puzzle..."

f) Fascinations:

Why 97% of eye creams fail (and it's not what you think)

The hidden breakdown happening at a microscopic level that no other product addresses

Why spending more money often makes the problem worse

g) Brief Credibility: "What I learned from a leading anti-aging physician with over 30 years of experience changed everything..."

h) Qualifiers: "This works for women over 35 who are tired of wasting money on products that don't deliver results..."

i) Address Skepticism: "I know this might sound too good to be true, especially if you've been disappointed before..."

j) Broad Testimonials: Quick mentions of women seeing dramatic results without revealing the product

3) Background Story (4:00)

a) Who Laura Is: Busy mom of two in Florida, just like many watching

b) Laura's Pain: Her devastating realization at age 37 - looking in the mirror and seeing crow's feet, dark circles, skin that had lost its "snap"

c) Traditional Solutions Failed:

Drugstore creams that did nothing

$200+ department store "miracles"

Dermatologist visits and expensive treatments

The mounting frustration and financial waste

d) Trigger Event: The moment she realized she was avoiding photos and mirrors, feeling invisible and losing her confidence

e) Search for Truth: How desperation led her to seek real answers, and a friend's referral to Dr. Schilling

4) The Meeting with Dr. Schilling & UMP Reveal (4:00)

a) The Referral: How a concerned friend referred Laura to Dr. Blane Schilling, a leading anti-aging physician with over 30 years of experience

b) The Consultation: Laura's visit to Dr. Schilling's office, expecting another disappointing consultation

c) The Shocking Revelation: Dr. Schilling's explanation of what no one else had told her - the real cause wasn't what she thought

d) UMP - Collagen Architecture Breakdown: Laura recounting Dr. Schilling's explanation:

It's not just collagen loss - it's "Collagen Architecture Breakdown" at the Dermal-Epidermal Junction (DEJ)

The fabric analogy he used to help her understand

Why this breakdown starts at the DEJ and spreads throughout

Scientific backing from his years of research

5) Dr. Schilling's Solution - UMS Reveal (4:00)

a) The MACRO Solution: Laura sharing Dr. Schilling's breakthrough - the "Structural Renewal System"

b) His Explanation: Not adding more collagen, but reorganizing and rebuilding the architecture

c) The MICRO - Three Steps Dr. Schilling Outlined:

Step 1: Structural Renewal Signal

Step 2: Targeted Repair Complex

Step 3: Integrity Locking System

d) The Problem: Dr. Schilling explained the science, but no existing product used this approach

e) The Challenge: He gave Laura the knowledge but told her she'd have to find or create a solution herself

6) Product Buildup + Reveal (5:00)

a) Laura's New Search: Armed with Dr. Schilling's insights, looking for a product that addressed DEJ breakdown

b) Out-of-Box Still Flawed: Why even with this knowledge, no existing eye cream targeted the real problem

c) Creating the Solution: Using Dr. Schilling's scientific framework to develop the right formula

d) Problems and Setbacks: Formulation challenges, getting the right ingredients, perfecting concentrations

e) Breakthrough Success: The moment they achieved Dr. Schilling's theoretical Structural Renewal System in a real product

f) Dr. Schilling's Approval: His endorsement of the final formula

g) Proof it Works: Laura's own transformation and early user results

h) Others Demanding It: Friends and family begging for the formula

i) UNITY EYE REVIVE SERUM is Born!

7) Close - Product Details & Value Building (4:00)

a) Product Details:

What's included in Unity Eye Revive Serum

The six clinically-proven ingredients Dr. Schilling recommended

Clean formulation standards

Precision application for delicate eye area

b) Dismiss Alternatives:

Expensive Botox ($500+ every 3-4 months)

Department store creams ($200-400 that only moisturize surface)

Harsh treatments with side effects

c) Value Building: Why this breakthrough formula is worth every penny

d) Additional Testimonials: Carol M, Elizabeth K, Patricia L stories

e) How to Use: Simple 30-second application, twice daily

f) Scarcity: Small-batch production, high demand, limited supplies

g) Personal Mission: Laura's commitment to helping women avoid her struggle

a) Cost of Alternatives: Botox, failed creams, continued aging

b) Retail Price: Normally $96, which is a bargain compared to alternatives
